_comment: Copy to harness/<screen-slug>-diff-manifest.json and fill in values
_sections_comment: Optional. Omit for single-viewport screens. Add when screen is taller than 852px (scrollable). Save ONE full-height Figma screenshot — harness crops it per section automatically.

sections.name: hero
sections._comment: scroll_y: CSS px to scroll before capture. capture_height: CSS px to crop.

mask_regions.name: status-bar
mask_regions._comment: Mask OS status bar to avoid time/signal diff. rect: [x, y, width, height] in CSS px

critical_regions.name: example-cta
critical_regions._comment: rect: [x, y, width, height] in CSS px (before DPR)

color_regions.name: primary-button
color_regions._comment: figma_token: Figma variable path; css_var: --cds-* var; expected_hex: auto-filled by populate-manifest
